title: RBI Grade B 2026 Notification Out — 60 Posts, Apply from April 29 at rbi.org.in
author: Ashutosh Khulbe
excerpt: RBI has released the Grade B Officer 2026 recruitment notification for 60 vacancies across three streams. Online registration starts April 29, 2026. Phase I exam expected in June-July 2026.
key_stat: 60 vacancies | Apply from April 29 at rbi.org.in

related_pages.title: Bank PO vs SSC CGL comparison

body: The Reserve Bank of India has officially released the Grade B Officer recruitment notification for 2026, announcing 60 vacancies across three streams. Online registration opens today, April 29, 2026, on the official RBI website at rbi.org.in.

The 60 vacancies are distributed across General (DR), DEPR (Department of Economic and Policy Research), and DSIM (Department of Statistics and Information Management) streams. The General stream has the most vacancies and is open to graduates from any discipline.

RBI Grade B is one of the most prestigious banking exams in India, offering a starting salary of approximately Rs 1.2 lakh per month including all allowances. The selection process involves Phase I (objective exam — qualifying), Phase II (descriptive exam — merit-based), and Interview. Phase I is expected in June-July 2026.

Eligibility: Minimum 21 years and maximum 30 years of age (with relaxation for reserved categories). Educational qualification: Bachelor's degree with minimum 60% marks (50% for SC/ST/PwD). For DEPR stream, a Master's degree in Economics is required. For DSIM, a Master's in Statistics is required.

callout.heading: Don't miss the application deadline
callout.content: Online registration opens April 29, 2026. The last date to apply will be mentioned in the detailed notification on rbi.org.in — typically 3-4 weeks from the notification date. Complete your application early. RBI's portal can be slow near the deadline due to heavy traffic. Keep your graduation marksheet, photo, and signature scan ready before starting.

faqs.question: What is the RBI Grade B 2026 salary?
faqs.answer: Starting basic pay is Rs 55,200 (Pay Level 10 equivalent). With DA, HRA, grade allowance, and other benefits, total monthly compensation is approximately Rs 1.2-1.5 lakh depending on the posting city. Additional perks include subsidized housing, medical facility, and LFC. RBI salary is significantly higher than IBPS PO or SBI PO starting salary.

faqs.question: How to apply for RBI Grade B 2026?
faqs.answer: Visit rbi.org.in → Opportunities → Current Vacancies → Grade B Officer 2026 → Click on online application link. Register with email and mobile, fill personal and educational details, upload photo and signature, and pay the application fee online. Fee: Rs 850 for General/OBC, Rs 100 for SC/ST/PwD.

faqs.question: Is RBI Grade B difficult to crack?
faqs.answer: Yes — it's among the toughest banking exams. Approximately 15,000-20,000 candidates compete for 60 posts. Phase I cutoff is typically 110-120 out of 200. Phase II tests essay writing, economic analysis, and finance knowledge at a much deeper level than IBPS PO. With focused preparation of 6-8 months alongside banking awareness and economics study, it's achievable.

faqs.question: Can IBPS PO preparation help for RBI Grade B?
faqs.answer: Phase I of RBI Grade B overlaps 70% with IBPS PO syllabus — Reasoning, Quantitative Aptitude, English, and General Awareness. However, Phase II is unique to RBI — it tests Economic and Social Issues, Finance and Management, and descriptive English at a much advanced level. You need 2-3 months of additional preparation specifically for Phase II beyond your IBPS PO preparation.
